=== Test 1: Variable Shadowing Across Functions ===
func_a x: 10
func_b x: 20
func_c x: 30
func_c y: 60
Results: 10 20 60

=== Test 2: Parameter Shadowing ===
process_a value: 5
process_b value: 5
Process results: 105 205

=== Test 3: Local Variable Shadowing ===
calculate_a temp: 5
calculate_a result: 10
calculate_b temp: 10
calculate_b result: 30
Calculate results: 10 30

=== Test 4: Variable Reassignment ===
z initially: 1
z after first reassign: 2
z after second reassign: 3
